name: get_step_count
description: Retrieve step count time series data for the authenticated user. Returns daily step totals for a specific date or date range. This is a convenience endpoint specifically for steps (a subset of the full activity summary). Use period values like '1d', '7d', '30d', '1w', '1m', '3m', '6m', '1y' to get step trends over time.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The end date for the time series, in YYYY-MM-DD format or 'today'.
